meta.title: AI tools and automation that save you time
meta.description: Custom AI strategy, workflow automation, and fractional CTO direction for growing Queensland businesses that want senior technical thinking without a full-time hire.

hero.heading: AI tools and automation that save you time.
hero.sub: Sometimes what you need isn't a website — it's someone senior to tell you what to build, what to automate, and what to fix. AI gives growing Queensland businesses custom AI strategy, workflow automation, and practical technical direction — including fractional CTO support — without the cost of a full-time technical hire.

included.heading: What's included
items: AI strategy and workflow automation (Zapier, Make, custom GPTs)
Training so your team can run with it

howItWorks: AI runs month-to-month or in short blocks, scoped to what you need.
relatedWorkNote: The AI pillar has no published case study yet — add one before launch (known content gap).

faq.question: Do you offer CTO or tech consulting?
faq.answer: Yes, under our AI service — fractional CTO direction, AI and automation strategy, IT, and project management, scoped month-to-month or in short blocks. Get a free quote for a plan tailored to what you need.

faq.question: Why are your prices lower than a traditional agency?
faq.answer: There's no agency overhead and no offshore handoff. I Love Digital is run solo by Jerrell, backed by two decades of product, technology, and business experience, so you get senior-level work direct from the person doing it — without paying for layers of account managers. Get a free quote and see for yourself.

ctaBand.heading: No price lists. Just an honest quote.
